title: VoiceSettings
description: Voice settings that override the stored settings for the given voice. Applied only on the current request.

stability.description: Controls the stability of the generated voice. Higher values produce more consistent output, lower values add variability.

similarity_boost.description: Controls how closely the AI adheres to the original voice. Higher values increase similarity to the target voice.

style.description: Controls the expressiveness and style of the speech delivery. Higher values produce more expressive speech.

use_speaker_boost.description: Enables speaker boost to increase voice clarity and reduce background artifacts.
